channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Renowned geneticist Francis Collins retires from NIH, urging 'respect' for embattled workers
item.description: Dr. Francis Collins, a renowned geneticist, and former longtime director of the National Institutes of Health, is retiring from the government agency and urging “respect” for its embattled workers.
item.dc:creator: Lauran Neergaard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Former Gov. Andrew Cuomo launches NYC mayoral bid
item.description: Former New York Gov. Andrew Cuomo launched his bid for New York City mayor with a video posted on his X account. This comes after much speculation that the governor would launch a comeback after leaving office in 2021.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: OPM's second email to federal employees asks what they did last week
item.description: The Trump administration sent federal workers another email asking about their accomplishments as Elon Musk works to uncover federal waste with the Department of Government Efficiency.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ukrainian president thanks Trump, US on X day after heated meeting
item.description: (NewsNation) — The day after a contentious back-and-forth in the Oval Office, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy publicly thanked President Donald Trump and the U.S. for its support during the three-year war. "We are very grateful to the United States for all the support.
item.dc:creator: Ashley N. Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Ukraine loses 220 troops on same day of Trump and Zelenskyy spat
item.description: Ukraine lost 220 troops on the battlefield on the same day its president had a fiery fallout with President Donald Trump in the White House leading to the collapse of a mineral deal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Frustrations mount as Stefanik stuck in limbo
item.description: Frustrations are growing as Rep. Elise Stefanik’s (R-N.Y.) wait to be confirmed as ambassador to the United Nations could stretch until April due to the House’s ultra-slim majority. Stefanik is facing a unique problem. Despite numerous international crises facing the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump's Oval Office thrashing of Zelenskyy shows limits of Western allies' ability to sway US leader
item.description: President Donald Trump’s Oval Office thrashing of Ukraine’s Volodymyr Zelenskyy has laid bare the limits of a full-court press by America’s allies aimed at reshaping Trump’s determination to end Russia’s invasion even if the terms are not to Ukraine’s liking.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: From Cabinet secretary to doomsday president: What being a designated survivor is like
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — They start the day often as low-profile Cabinet secretaries. They end it that way, too, God willing.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tulsi Gabbard thanks Trump for ‘unwavering leadership’ in Oval Office clash with Zelenskyy
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard commended President Trump's "unwavering leadership" Friday after a controversial dustup with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy in the Oval Office.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: State Sen. Shannon Grove introduces bill for additional protection for sex trafficking victims, fines for perpetrators
item.description: Grove's previous proposals -- which were signed into law -- exclude cases with 16 and 17-year-old victims.
item.dc:creator: Jenny Huh, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ukraine ambassador's reaction to fiery Trump-Zelenskyy Oval Office clash goes viral
item.description: A video of Ukrainian Ambassador Oksana Markarova's reaction to Friday's heated exchange between President Donald Trump and Ukrainian President Zelenskyy at the White House went viral.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump and Zelenskyy through the years: From a 'perfect' call to an Oval Office meltdown
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The first time he spoke to Volodymyr Zelenskyy, President Donald Trump tried to pressure Ukraine's new leader to dig up dirt on Joe Biden ahead of the 2020 election. It was a 2019 phone call that eventually sparked an impeachment.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: JD Vance gets his long-awaited moment to admonish Ukraine's Zelenskyy
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — Vice President JD Vance was dismissing Ukraine long before he upended an Oval Office meeting Friday by calling Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy “disrespectful” and asking if he had ever thanked the U.S. for its support. When Vance was a candidate for U.S.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How the Trump, Zelensky meeting went off the rails
item.description: Efforts to negotiate an end to the war in Ukraine were left in tatters following President Trump’s confrontational White House meeting with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky, which erupted into one of the most remarkable Oval Office scenes in years.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Politics Friday: Newly elected lawmakers reflect on their first legislative session
item.description: MPR News host Brian Bakst talks with two state representatives serving in their first legislative session. Later, a conversation with State Auditor Julie Blaha.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst and Matthew Alvarez, MPR News

item.title: 1 thing that upended years of U.S. foreign policy
item.description: Three years after Russia launched its invasion of Ukraine, the U.S., in a split with its European allies over the war, sided with Russia at the U.N.
item.dc:creator: Domenico Montanaro, MPR News

item.title: Senate Republicans seek major changes to House-passed Trump budget bill
item.description: Senate Republicans are staring down a major fight to overhaul the House's budget resolution as lawmakers eye big changes. Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.), with the help of President Trump’s muscle, was able to get the House's plan to enact Trump's sweeping legislative agenda past a key hurdle Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Trump, UK's Keir Starmer speak after meetings
item.description: Starmer is expected to try to convince Trump that Ukraine and European leaders need a place at the table for peace talks.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: Student loan borrowers face abrupt change as GOP budget plans threaten to raise payments
item.description: Student loan borrowers could see their payments increase under budget plans currently under discussion by House Republicans, a violent about-face after years of working with the Biden administration to lower payments and secure debt relief.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, Fox 5

item.title: Trump defends Musk’s ‘genius’ email to federal workers
item.description: President Trump on Monday defended tech billionaire Elon Musk after pushback over his email demanding federal workers list five accomplishments from the past week and in doing so, raising the of risk losing their jobs. “There was a lot of genius in sending it.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, WFLA, NBC
